item.title: EU MiCA full enforcement in effect as of July 1; crypto-asset service providers without authorization must cease EU operations
U.S. CLARITY Act stalls in Senate with three unresolved disputes; floor vote window narrows as chamber returns July 13
CoinDCX confirms $44M stolen from operational wallet via employee social-engineering attack; customer funds unaffected
July crypto hack outflows top $140M across CoinDCX, GMX, BigONE, and WOO X, per PeckShield data
GMX protocol lost $42M in July exploit; majority of stolen assets subsequently recovered
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $224M net inflow on July 2, ending a 10-session consecutive outflow streak
SEC issued guidance clarifying federal securities law application to crypto assets, elevating digital assets to a top agency priority
SEC and CFTC signed a memorandum of understanding March 11 establishing a joint framework for crypto regulatory coordination
OCC issued a 350-page GENIUS Act notice of proposed rulemaking on Feb. 25 setting standards for payment stablecoin issuers
Treasury's FinCEN and OFAC proposed joint AML and sanctions compliance rules for stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act
FDIC proposed GENIUS Act compliance requirements for supervised depository institutions issuing or holding payment stablecoins
BlackRock launched a Bitcoin Income ETF, expanding its digital asset product lineup on U.S. exchanges
JPMorgan filed to launch a new tokenized fund on Ethereum as Wall Street tokenization activity accelerates
